form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won comfortably by 5 lengths at this track (22.07) beating Rev Ken in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on March 30. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won comfortably by 5 lengths at this track (22.07) beating Rev Ken in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on March 30. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Ran wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Had been in top form winning two on end before last start when showed strong pace early and gave a sight before being swamped late, finishing a 4 length fourth (25.28) at Ballarat. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in top form winning two on end before last start when showed strong pace early and gave a sight before being swamped late, finishing a 4 length fourth (25.28) at Ballarat. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to score by 2 lengths in a Free For All last start at this track, recording a head turning 22.09 over the 390m journey. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Impressive performance to score by 2 lengths in a Free For All last start at this track, recording a head turning 22.09 over the 390m journey. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (25.90) over 460m at Warragul. Squeeze draw to overcome. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (25.90) over 460m at Warragul. Squeeze draw to overcome. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Faltered turning off back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (23.07) over 410m at Horsham. Capable of a good showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (23.07) over 410m at Horsham. Capable of a good showing.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 450m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 450m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.5 lengths over 390m at this track in a handy 22.14, beating Patriot Niamh. The one to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.5 lengths over 390m at this track in a handy 22.14, beating Patriot Niamh. The one to beat again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 4/5 at Geelong when a 3.5 lengths third but did run a respectable 22.68 over the 400m journey. Has the ability and looks an each way chance.
